title: Add dynamic parameter passing and conditional step execution to orchestrator
goal: 오케스트레이터에 스텝 간 동적 파라미터 전달(${steps[0].result.data.url} 패턴)과 조건부 스텝 실행(condition 필드)을 추가한다. AI review_budget을 1에서 3으로 증가시킨다.

test_requirements.case: Step with false condition is skipped
test_requirements.expected: step.result is None, status is done

test_requirements.case: Step with true condition executes normally

test_requirements.expected: params.url equals the value from step 0 result

test_requirements.case: Invalid template reference falls back gracefully
test_requirements.expected: unresolved template stays as empty string, no crash

test_requirements.case: review_budget allows 3 AI reviews per task

constraints: Do not change the existing Step fields (tool, params, description, risk_level, result)
Add new fields as optional with defaults (condition=None, param_template=False)
Do not break existing serialization in engine.py (_update_db, deserialize_task)
Do not modify intent router or gateway
Existing orchestrator tests must continue to pass
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
